name: Claim denied after finger smash at work in Millcreek, what now?
description: File for ULC hearing, prepare evidence and testimony on injury details.[3]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after finger smash at work in Millcreek, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: File for ULC hearing, prepare evidence and testimony on injury details.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Request a hearing with Utah Labor Commission if denied; prepare testimony on incident, symptoms, job duties.[3] Common denials: late report, pre-existing, no work link.[2][3] Key factors: (1) File dispute promptly; (2) Gather medicals, witnesses; (3) Expect cross-exam on history; (4) Be consistent truthful.[3][6] Organize records, practice responses, notify of third-party pursuits. Hearings resolve most disputes effectively.
